name: Chain Bridge I Class A Ordinary Shares
summary: Chain Bridge I is a blank check company, also known as a special purpose acquisition company (SPAC), formed for the purpose of effecting a merger, capital stock exchange, asset acquisition, stock purchase, reorganization or similar business combination with one or more businesses. SPACs typically do not have an initial business operation and use funds raised in an initial public offering (IPO) to acquire an existing private company. The headquarters is likely in the United States.
